Class BatchGetBuilder<T>

java.lang.Object
dev.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.builder.BatchGetBuilder<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the item type
public class BatchGetBuilder<T> extends Object
Builds a batch get operation to retrieve multiple items from a single table by their keys.

Obtain via Table.batchGet().

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    BatchGetBuilder(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbEnhancedClient enhancedClient, @NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbTable<T> table, @NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.DynamoDbClient dynamoDbClient)
    Constructs a batch get builder for the given table.

    Method
    Description
    @NonNull BatchGetBuilder<T>
    addKey(@NonNull Object partitionKey)
    Adds a key to retrieve by partition key only.

    Adds a key to retrieve by partition and sort key.

    Adds multiple keys at once.

    Enables or disables strongly consistent reads for this batch get.
    @NonNull BatchGetResult<T>
    execute()
    Executes the batch get operation and returns all matching items along with any unprocessed keys.

    Restricts the returned attributes to the specified ones.

    Restricts the returned attributes by configuring a ProjectionExpression via a consumer.

    Configures whether to return consumed capacity information for the operation.

    Methods inherited from class Object

  • Constructor Details

    • BatchGetBuilder

      public BatchGetBuilder(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbEnhancedClient enhancedClient, @NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbTable<T> table, @NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.DynamoDbClient dynamoDbClient)
      Constructs a batch get builder for the given table.

      Typically obtained via Table.batchGet().

      Parameters:
      enhancedClient - the enhanced DynamoDB client
      table - the typed DynamoDB table
      dynamoDbClient - the low-level DynamoDB client (used for projection fallback)

  • Method Details

    • addKey

      public @NonNull BatchGetBuilder<T> addKey(@NonNull Object partitionKey)
      Adds a key to retrieve by partition key only.
      Parameters:
      partitionKey - the partition key value
      Returns:
      this builder

    • addKey

      public @NonNull BatchGetBuilder<T> addKey(@NonNull Object partitionKey, @NonNull Object sortKey)
      Adds a key to retrieve by partition and sort key.
      Parameters:
      partitionKey - the partition key value
      sortKey - the sort key value
      Returns:
      this builder

    • addKeys

      public @NonNull BatchGetBuilder<T> addKeys(@NonNull Collection<software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.Key> keys)
      Adds multiple keys at once.
      Parameters:
      keys - the keys to retrieve
      Returns:
      this builder

    • consistentRead

      public @NonNull BatchGetBuilder<T> consistentRead(boolean consistentRead)
      Enables or disables strongly consistent reads for this batch get.

      If not set, the default (eventually consistent) is used by the DynamoDB API.

      Parameters:
      consistentRead - true for strongly consistent reads
      Returns:
      this builder

    • project

      public @NonNull BatchGetBuilder<T> project(@NonNull String... attributes)
      Restricts the returned attributes to the specified ones.
      Parameters:
      attributes - the attribute names to include in each result
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • project

      public @NonNull BatchGetBuilder<T> project(@NonNull Consumer<ProjectionExpression> projectionBuilder)
      Restricts the returned attributes by configuring a ProjectionExpression via a consumer.
      Parameters:
      projectionBuilder - a consumer that configures the ProjectionExpression
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • returnConsumedCapacity

      public @NonNull BatchGetBuilder<T> returnConsumedCapacity(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.ReturnConsumedCapacity returnConsumedCapacity)
      Configures whether to return consumed capacity information for the operation.
      Parameters:
      returnConsumedCapacity - the consumed capacity reporting level
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • execute

      public @NonNull BatchGetResult<T> execute()
      Executes the batch get operation and returns all matching items along with any unprocessed keys.

      If a projection was set via project(String...), the operation falls back to the low-level DynamoDB API to support attribute filtering.

      Returns:
      a BatchGetResult containing the retrieved items and unprocessed keys
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if more than 100 keys are provided
